## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran local checks relevant to this change.
- [ ] CI is passing (`Backend checks`, `Frontend checks`).
- [ ] This change has test coverage, or I explained why not.
- [ ] If this can affect production behavior, rollout/rollback is documented.
- [ ] I verified no secrets were committed.

## Risk and rollback

Risk level: low / medium / high

Rollback plan:
